fields.title: The Haunted Mine
fields.description: Investigate rumors of spirits haunting the local iron mine.

fields.title: The Mine Entrance
fields.body: The yawning mouth of the iron mine lies before you, guarded by a pair of bored-looking sentries. You need to get inside, but they won't just let you stroll in.

fields.label: Sneak past the guards
fields.arrival_flavor: You slip silently past the sleeping guard and descend into the darkness.

fields.label: Bribe the guards
fields.arrival_flavor: You hand over a handful of coins, and the guards look the other way.

fields.title: Fight the Guards
fields.body: You step forward, weapon drawn. The guards shout in alarm and move to intercept you!

fields.label: Engage in combat
fields.arrival_flavor: With a final blow, you drive the guards back and rush into the mine.

fields.title: A Quiet Entry
fields.body: The guards count the coin and chuckle, stepping aside. 'Good luck in there,' one says with a smirk. 'You'll need it.' You walk down a long, well-lit side tunnel.

fields.label: Continue deep into the side tunnel
fields.arrival_flavor: The tunnel leads you to a peaceful grotto away from the hauntings.

fields.title: Deep in the Mine
fields.body: The air here is cold and damp. Strange whispers echo off the walls. You find yourself at a fork in the tunnel. One path smells of ozone and magic, the other of old iron and dust.

fields.label: Follow the scent of magic
fields.arrival_flavor: You follow the shimmering light into a grand chamber.

fields.label: Follow the scent of iron
fields.arrival_flavor: You find the source of the haunting: a cursed iron idol.

fields.title: Defeated
fields.body: The guards are too strong. They overpower you and drag you to a makeshift cell. Your adventure ends here.

fields.label: Return to town
fields.arrival_flavor: You are eventually released and limp back to town.

fields.title: A Peaceful Grotto
fields.body: The side tunnel opens into a beautiful hidden cave, untouched by spirits. You spend some time in contemplation before heading back.

fields.label: Return to town
fields.arrival_flavor: You take the long way back to the square.

fields.title: Mystical Purge
fields.body: You find the source of the hauntings and use your knowledge to cleanse the area. The spirits are at peace.

fields.label: Return to town
fields.arrival_flavor: The town feels brighter as you return.

fields.title: Shattered Curse
fields.body: You smash the cursed iron idol into pieces. The malevolent energy dissipates instantly. The mine is safe once more.

fields.label: Return to town
fields.arrival_flavor: You return a hero, iron dust still on your boots.
